title: Portfolio Website
description: The website you are seeing right now, showcasing my projects and skills.

title: Meteora
description: Meteora is a fictional web store created for educational purposes. Its key features include the use of reusable components, button-based filtering, a search bar, API fetching, and responsive design.

title: Alfabit Design System
description: Alfabit is an innovative technology company dedicated to providing creative and efficient solutions for its clients. Recognizing the importance of consistent and intuitive design across all its platforms and products, Alfabit decided to invest in a cutting-edge design system. This design system serves as a comprehensive guide for the company's design and development teams, ensuring that all digital products maintain a cohesive look and feel while enhancing user experience.
